category_sources: Official GitHub README describes ideviceinstaller as a command-line application to manage apps and app archives on iOS devices.
source_facts.description says it is a tool for managing apps on iOS devices.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes features, installation, getting started, usage, and manual-page guidance.
Official README links the libimobiledevice homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value `https://github.com/libimobiledevice/ideviceinstaller`; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README lists install, upgrade, uninstall, browse, and app package support for iOS devices.
